name: On Call Cash
description_short: On Call Cash offers payday and car title loans at three Las Vegas locations, providing same-day emergency funding for residents in the East Las Vegas and Downtown areas.
description_long:
On Call Cash is a Las Vegas-based emergency lending company operating three physical locations across the metro area: Desert Inn Rd & Topaz Rd (opened 2020), Westcliff Dr & Buffalo Dr, and Silverado Ranch Blvd & Bermuda Rd. The company specializes in short-term cash solutions designed to help residents bridge immediate financial gaps. They position themselves as a full-service lender catering to the Eastside, East Las Vegas, and Downtown Las Vegas communities, with customer testimonials emphasizing staff friendliness and professional service. The company maintains regular business hours across all locations and offers online application options to streamline the borrowing process.

On Call Cash's core product offerings include payday loans and vehicle title loans (both car and motorcycle). Their marketing emphasizes fast funding and accessibility, with an online application tool that promises callback from a team member within minutes. The company collects basic personal information (name, phone, email) and requires consent for electronic communications and disclosures before processing inquiries. They operate within Nevada's regulatory framework for consumer lending and maintain transparent contact information and business hours.

The company differentiates itself primarily through staff quality and customer service, as evidenced by repeated mentions of specific staff members (Terri and Luis) in customer testimonials. All five available customer reviews highlight professionalism, politeness, and courteous treatment. The Desert Inn location's recent opening (2020) positions it as a newer facility serving growing demand in East Las Vegas. The company's multi-location presence and online application capability provide operational convenience compared to single-location competitors.

As with all payday and title loan providers, On Call Cash operates in a high-cost lending category. The website does not disclose specific APRs, fees, loan terms, or maximum loan amounts, which is typical for this industry but limits consumer transparency at the initial research stage. Borrowers should expect significantly higher costs than traditional bank loans or credit union alternatives. The requirement for consent to automated calling and marketing contact is standard practice but represents a trade-off for fast processing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Three physical Las Vegas locations including a newly opened 2020 Desert Inn store serving East Las Vegas residents
Multiple product options: payday loans, car title loans, and motorcycle title loans for different collateral situations
Online application available to start the borrowing process remotely, with promised callback within minutes
Consistent customer testimonials specifically praising named staff members (Terri, Luis) for professional and friendly service
Extended business hours including Saturday service (10 AM–3 PM) across all locations
Clear driving directions and landmark-based location descriptions for easy physical access
Transparent contact information with dedicated phone lines and email for each location
cons: Website does not disclose specific APR rates, fees, loan terms, or maximum loan amounts, preventing upfront cost comparison
Payday and title loans are inherently high-cost financial products with rates typically far exceeding traditional lending
Requires consent to automated telephone calls and prerecorded marketing messages, which may lead to frequent contact
No information provided about credit requirements, income verification, or loan underwriting criteria
Limited product diversity—only payday and title loans offered, with no mention of alternatives like payment plans or lower-cost options
best_for: East Las Vegas and Eastside residents needing immediate cash who can access physical locations convenient to their area
Vehicle owners seeking short-term loans using their car or motorcycle as collateral
Borrowers with low credit scores who cannot qualify for traditional bank loans or credit cards
Consumers who prefer in-person loan processing and staff consultation over online-only lenders
diagnosis: On Call Cash is best for East Las Vegas residents who own vehicles and need emergency cash within hours or days, with access to a nearby physical location and preference for staff-assisted service. The primary caveat is that payday and title loans carry very high costs (typically 300%+ APR equivalent) and should only be used for genuine emergencies when no lower-cost alternatives like personal loans, credit cards, or credit union PALs are available.
services: Car title loans (collateral-based lending using vehicle title)
Motorcycle title loans (collateral-based lending using motorcycle title)
In-person loan consultations at three Las Vegas locations
Online loan application and inquiry submission
Marketing and outreach via automated telephone calls and text messaging
Extended weekend hours (Saturday service) across all locations
Same-day or next-day emergency cash funding
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2625 E Desert Inn Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89121
